headline: Suncor Energy Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
summary: SU expects refinery throughput of 460,000-475,000 bbls/d, with utilization rates between 90% and 93%, and refined product sales in the range of 600,000-620,000 bbls/d.

headline: USA Compression Q1 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
summary: USAC expects its full-year 2026 adjusted EBITDA to be between $770 million and $800 million, and distributable cash flow to be between $480 million and $510 million.

headline: VoltaGrid Announces $1 Billion Strategic Equity Investment from Blackstone and Halliburton to Fund Growth and Acquisition of Propell
summary: Investment to Accelerate Buildout of Behind-the-Meter Power Generation Platform for AI Data CentersHOUSTON, May 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- VoltaGrid LLC ("VoltaGrid" or the "Company"), a leading behind-the-meter power generation business, today announced that it has signed agreements for a $1.0 billion strategic equity investment from funds managed by Blackstone Tactical Opportunities ("Blackstone" or "Tac Opps") and Halliburton Company. headline: The World Is Burning Through Oil With No Resupply in Sight. Is SHEL Stock a Buy Before the Squeeze Gets Worse?
